nasb.text: All the kings of the earth will give thanks to You, O Lord, When they have heard the words of Your mouth.

esv.text: All the kings of the earth shall give you thanks, O Lord, for they have heard the words of your mouth,

cnv.text: 耶和華啊！世上的君王都要稱謝你， 因為他們聽見了你口中的言語。

ccb.text: 耶和华啊，世上所有的君王听见你的话都要称谢你。

csbs.text: 耶和华啊，地上所有的君王都要称谢你， 因为他们听见了你口中的言语！
